category_sources: Official suckless page describes ii as a minimalist FIFO and filesystem-based IRC client.
source_facts.description says ii is a minimalist IRC client.
display_name_sources: Official suckless page heading uses Irc it (ii).
docs_sources: Official suckless project page documents behavior and usage examples; linked official usage page is the dedicated documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official suckless page links to the source repository and gives git clone https://git.suckless.org/ii.
tags_sources: Official suckless page describes FIFO and filesystem-based IRC communication from the command line.
